title: Prohibit Realized Map Artifact Tags
forbids: realized-map artifact namespace claims across mod and core source
why: MapGen artifact IDs may describe stable projection or observation data products, but execution completion is represented by effect tags and engine-derived observations use explicitly named artifact layers rather than an artifact:map.realized.* namespace.
message: Use effect:map.* execution guarantees or explicitly named artifact:map.* observation layers instead of artifact:map.realized.*.
